title: Juvale 12 Pack Clear 4 Oz Glass Bottles with Cork Lids, Tiny Vintage Style Potion Vases for Party Favors, DIY Crafts (120 ml)
description:
About this item
Mini Bottles with Cork Lids: Use these 4 oz glass bottles with lids to create custom party favors or small flower vases for a baby shower, wedding, or birthday party
Unleash Your Creativity: The squared apothecary bottles can be used to store craft supplies, essential oils, spices, seashells, or colored sand; craft them into home accessories or shelf ornaments
Bottle Up the Magic: Safeguard your precious creations with our empty potion bottles with cork stoppers that help to keep contents safely inside
Small in Size, Big in Potential: Discover the perfect size for your arts and crafts needs with our glass cork bottles that measure 5 x 2 x 2 inches and boast a generous 4 ounce (120 ml) capacity
Package Contents: Elevate your decor with our set of 12 small bottles, each adorned with a cork lid, bringing a touch of rustic-style elegance to your space
› See more product details
reviews_5s:
These bottles are well made and a nice shape. I put messages inside as gifts. The glass is clear and the cork stopper looks very nice.Worked great for what I needed them for: filling them with bunched-up copper wire fairy lights (battery-powered) and stringing them up with twine around the bottle-necks.

Unlike for some reviewers, the corks with mine weren't loose. Fit perfectly well with the wire sticking out of two sides of the opening as well, although I had to be careful when moving them around during production because the springiness of the wire did occasionally pop a cork out here and there. So if you try this project, definitely Gorilla glue the corks in place once you have the lights how you want them, anyway.

Also, definitely do not attempt to hang the bottles by the wire alone as they are glass and thus too heavy for some glued cork-stoppers to support (I would imagine). I used twine from Joann fabric/craft store. I double-tied it around the neck of each bottle, wrapped it around the wire lights connecting each bottle a couple of times, and then made sure it was shorter than the wire segment to assure all the tension/weight was on the twine and not the wire.

Happy crafting! :)I like my kitchen seasonings looking like old time alchemy. Avoid seasonings that are too powdery, it can get messy, but grainy seasonings, it's perfect. I don't like the cupboard look, with all different size bottles, where you can't see the smaller bottles, so this perfect. Better for seasonings you estimate, not where you're measuring exact amounts.Used these to make halloween potion bottles. My daughter loved it.Awesome quality and packaged nice so nothing broke.I ordered these to make "Halloween" decorations (jars for brew mix). They are thick and look cute with the "Halloween Labels" attached to them.I use these bottles to make Harry Potter themed potions. They are perfect for this purpose. Attached a photo of my Polyjuice Potion as an example. They always arrive safely with no cracks or missing parts. I've purchased about 3 of these so far.I decided to use these for my vanilla extract Christmas gifts I’m making this year! RecommendSolo no era lo que busco pero es un excelente producto y precioThese were perfect for my glass craft group we did glass painting and sand art. They packed it in Styrofoam so they were in good shape even though the box had other items and looked a little rough upped.
reviews_1s: Description said 5 x 2 x 2, they are 4x2x2Arrived without corksMuy pequeños, me los esperaba mas grandes. Decepción
